mapper.insert: insert into dish (name, pic, detail, price, category_id, headquarters_id, create_user, update_user, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{name}, #{pic}, #{detail}, #{price}, #{categoryId}, #{headquartersId}, #{createUser}, #{updateUser}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.delete:
delete from dish where id in
#{id}
mapper.select: select d.* from dish d inner join store_dish sd on d.id = sd.dish_id where sd.store_id = #{storeId} and sd.status = 1 and d.category_id = #{categoryId} and d.status = 1
select * from dish where headquarters_id = #{headquartersId} order by id desc
